tasks.label: local-server-5501
args: $port = 5501; $exists = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort $port -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($exists) { Write-Host 'Serving HTTP on 127.0.0.1 port 5501 already running'; while ($true) { Start-Sleep -Seconds 3600 } } else { python -m http.server $port --bind 127.0.0.1 }
